_comment: Fleet node models (32GB RAM, CPU-only Linux). No cloud providers — all cloud requests route through A2A bridge to orchestrator. No MLX models — Apple Silicon only. No models >8B params. GAP-3.
_hardware: 32GB RAM, CPU-only (no GPU). i7-10710U 12c. For: fnet3, fnet4, fnet5, fnet6.
_cloud_routing: Fleet nodes have NO direct cloud API access. Cloud requests go through A2A bridge to orchestrator. model-router.json uses 'cloud-via-a2a' placeholder for cloud routes.

models._note: Local 4B vision — fast/lightweight tier. maxTokens 4096 per MAX-TOKENS-GUIDE. 262K ctx technically supported but practically capped by 32GB RAM on CPU.

models.name: MiniCPM-o 2.6 8B
models._note: Vision-capable 5.5GB model — mid-tier local cost. CPU inference on 32GB nodes. Largest model that fits with headroom.
Gemma 3 4B — general purpose local model. 128K ctx, vision capable, CPU-friendly, non-reasoning.
Nomic embed text v1.5 — 768 dims (Matryoshka to 256), 8K context. 274MB, runs on CPU. For ChromaDB embedding pipeline.
Whisper STT — local speech-to-text based on OpenAI Whisper. 2GB. Community model. For STT pipeline.
Orpheus TTS English Q4 — local text-to-speech, 8 voices, emotional tags. 2.4GB Q4_K_M. For TTS pipeline.
